full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #50 (2026-06-02)

PULSE
Health: 0.6541 (B). 1034 wallets, 293 contributors. 97 memos today vs 104 avg. Velocity steady.

FLOW
99 reward payments, 508545 PFT distributed to 21 contributors. Top earner: rhwiJx...2TaE (107003 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued today totaling 3,500 PFT. Highest: r4ahFv...5XyU (3,500 PFT). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (31,300 PFT, avg 3,912/day over 8 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rs5gTo...VF97 (64 memos). Fastest new contributor: rU963x...fyUj (11.3 memos/day in 3 days). 26 new wallet(s) this week. 58 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 70.9%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-05-03): 147 transactions from 25 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
